entry.title: New: CC 25-15 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
COUNCIL CHAIR LEE, transmitting a proposed amendment to Bill 47, CD1, FD1 (2025), entitled "A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR TO ENTER INTO AN INTERGOVERNMENTAL AGREEMENT WITH THE STATE OF HAWAIʻI, DEPARTMENT OF BUSINESS, ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND TOURISM, AND THE COUNTIES OF HAWAIʻI, FOR THE HAWAIʻI CREATIVE ECONOMY COLLABORATIVE".

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
